mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.type_id, a.device_id, a.status, a.update_time FROM tunnel_check_alarm a INNER JOIN ( SELECT type_id, device_id, MAX(id) as max_id FROM tunnel_check_alarm WHERE update_time >= #{startTime} AND update_time < #{endTime} GROUP BY type_id, device_id ) b ON a.type_id = b.type_id AND a.device_id = b.device_id AND a.id = b.max_id
SELECT id, type_id, device_id, status, update_time FROM tunnel_check_alarm ORDER BY type_id, device_id, id DESC

SELECT t1.type_id, t1.device_id, -- 统计各状态次数 SUM(CASE WHEN t1.status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as count_0, SUM(CASE WHEN t1.status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as count_1, SUM(CASE WHEN t1.status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as count_2, -- 最新状态（id最大的那条记录的状态） MAX(CASE WHEN t1.id = max_ids.max_id THEN t1.status END) as latest_status, -- 最近3次中status=0的次数（使用自连接计算序号） SUM(CASE WHEN seq_nums.seq_num <= 3 AND t1.status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as recent_3_count_0, -- 最近3次中status=2的次数 SUM(CASE WHEN seq_nums.seq_num <= 3 AND t1.status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as recent_3_count_2, -- 连续未上报次数（在Java中计算，这里返回0作为占位符） 0 as consecutive_missed, -- 最新记录的更新时间 MAX(CASE WHEN t1.id = max_ids.max_id THEN t1.update_time END) as latest_update_time, -- 记录总数 COUNT(*) as total_count FROM tunnel_check_alarm t1 -- 获取每个设备的最大id（用于判断最新记录） INNER JOIN ( SELECT type_id, device_id, MAX(id) as max_id FROM tunnel_check_alarm GROUP BY type_id, device_id ) max_ids ON t1.type_id = max_ids.type_id AND t1.device_id = max_ids.device_id -- 计算每个设备每条记录的序号（用于判断最近3次） -- 优化：只计算最近12条记录的序号 INNER JOIN ( SELECT t2.id, COUNT(*) as seq_num FROM tunnel_check_alarm t2 INNER JOIN tunnel_check_alarm t3 ON t2.type_id = t3.type_id AND t2.device_id = t3.device_id AND t3.id >= t2.id GROUP BY t2.id, t2.type_id, t2.device_id HAVING COUNT(*) <= #{limitCount} ) seq_nums ON t1.id = seq_nums.id GROUP BY t1.type_id, t1.device_id HAVING COUNT(*) = #{limitCount} ORDER BY t1.type_id, t1.device_id
